title: Implement URL Shortener REST API as a Single-Binary Go Project

steps.description: Define the domain model for URL entities including value objects and entities.
steps.done_condition: Domain model for URL entities is implemented and tested.

steps.description: Establish necessary ports for interaction between domain and adapters.
steps.done_condition: Ports interface for URL interaction is defined and tested.

steps.description: Implement in-memory storage for URL management.
steps.done_condition: In-memory storage implementation is complete and tested.

steps.description: Develop primary adapter to handle HTTP requests and responses for the REST API.
steps.done_condition: HTTP adapter for URL shortener is implemented and endpoints are operational.

steps.description: Create use cases for URL shortening and retrieval logic.
steps.done_condition: Use cases for shortening and retrieving URLs are developed and tested.

steps.description: Wire all components in main.go for the application entry point.
steps.done_condition: All components are wired and the application starts without errors.

steps.description: Implement integration tests to validate the overall API functionality.
steps.done_condition: All integration tests are passing, confirming API functionality.

mergeOrder: Merge domain and ports before starting on secondary and primary adapters.
Merge secondary adapters before primary adapters.
Merge use cases after both adapters are completed.
Merge composition root after all components are created.
successCriteria: Successfully run the API and handle URL shortening requests.
All components are tested individually and as part of the integration.
